archived_by: PM (V1.49 P3 closed R-V148P4-W3: reconcile lock duration)

residual_findings.title: reconcile-chapters holds Work runtime lock for full filesystem walk + DB + file I/O duration
residual_findings.source: qc3 W-3 (P4 tri-review); closed in V1.49 P3
residual_findings.closure_note: V1.49 P3 (commit aeb95397, merged at 17414d6): reconcile_from_filesystem split into read-only compute_reconcile_diff (unlocked filesystem walk + per-chapter DB reads) and write-only apply_reconcile_diff (the only phase under the runtime lock). The handler computes the diff before RuntimeLockGuard::acquire and holds the lock only across apply. Tests: test_reconcile_chapters_read_phase_runs_unlocked, test_reconcile_chapters_releases_lock_on_error (apply-phase error preserves V1.48 P4-fix1 guarantee), test_compute_is_read_only_then_apply_writes. Tracing emits acquired_at / held_ms for operator observability. Stale-diff trade-off accepted under local-first single-writer daemon model. QA: 9 runtime_lock tests pass + clippy clean.
residual_findings.closure_evidence: iteration/v1.49 @ 17414d6 (P3 merge) + aeb95397 (T1); qc1/qc2/qc3 all Approve; qa.md @ df793aae PASS
